turns.subject: Context: Series A $14M closed March 2026
turns.body:
Jordan,

Arcana Analytics has doubled its open job postings in the last 60 days.

Companies scaling after a Series A often face bottlenecks integrating new ML engineers.

Tenacious provides pre-vetted, project-ready ML engineering pods that can deploy in days.

What challenges are you encountering scaling your ML engineering team?

Birkity
Research Partner, Tenacious Intelligence Corporation
gettenacious.com
grounding_facts: Arcana Analytics has doubled its open job postings in the last 60 days

turns.reply_text:
Hi Birkity,
Thanks for reaching out.
You’re right that we’ve been hiring, but our main challenge isn’t capacity — it’s onboarding new ML engineers into an existing stack and getting them productive quickly without slowing current work.
I’m curious how Tenacious approaches integration with an in-flight ML roadmap rather than just adding headcount.
Happy to hear more.

interpretation.reasoning: The prospect acknowledges the hiring signal and states their main challenge is onboarding new ML engineers and integrating them into their existing stack. This self-disclosure of a specific pain point related to ML engineering, which is the service we offer, indicates interest.
grounding_facts_used: Arcana Analytics has doubled its open job postings in the last 60 days.
Tenacious provides pre-vetted, project-ready ML engineering pods that can deploy in days.

turns.subject: Re: Booking link - Arcana Analytics
turns.body:
Jordan Osei,

Great to hear from you. Here is a link to book a time:

https://cal.com/birkity-famsl2/intro-call-engineering-scaling?name=Jordan+Osei&email=jordan.osei%40sink.example.com&notes=Tenacious+can+augment+Arcana+Analytics%27+ML+engineering+team+to+accelerate+the+development+of+their+AI-first+credit+intelligence+layer.

Pick any slot that works -- looking forward to the conversation.

Birkity
Research Partner, Tenacious Intelligence Corporation
gettenacious.com
